title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: An educational video explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals in under 10 minutes. The content covers IAM concepts including users, roles, and policies; introduces the least privilege security principle; and explains IAM Access Analyzer and secure account setup practices for beginners.
